calendar.matters:
Joint Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jul-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anthony Matricciani appeared by zoom for Amalia Romero (Respondent).

The Court noted that Mr. Golden is not present. Mr. Matricciani stated that Adam Romero, Jr. got notice, that Isabella did not participate in the settlement conference and that no one has contacted him complaining about the settlement agreement. The Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendments For Lack Of Capacity; Undue Influence; For Imposition Of Construction Trust; For Fraud And Undue Influence
Off Calendar Jun-17-2019 Continued To Jan-06-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Guglielmino for Joseph Romero.
Jon Vaught appeared by telephone for Emilia Romero.

Mr. Guglielmino requested a 180-day continuance stating that they are having a problem obtaining a Mediator that is willing to take on the complicated issues, that he has not conducted discovery and that there is a question of capacity. The Petition to Invalidate Trust Amendments for Lack of Capacity, etc. is set for trial in the department of the Presiding Judge (206) on January 6, 2020 at 9:30 a.m., (order for the same signed in open court/a copy of the order and notice of trial was provided to Counsel).

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendments For Lack Of Capacity; Undue Influence; For Imposition Of Construction Trust; For Fraud And Undue Influence
Off Calendar Apr-15-2019 Continued To Jun-17-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael John Guglielmino for Joseph Romero.
Jon R. Vaught appearing by CourtCall for Emelia Romero.

Mr. Guglielmino provided a brief update and addressed a scheduling issue with regard to the mediator. The Court continued the matter to June 17, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on the mediation. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by June 12, 2019. The Court stated that due to the length of time that has passed that if the mediation is not successful that the parties should be prepared to set the matter for trial.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: K. Chan. Matter not reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendments For Lack Of Capacity; Undue Influence; For Imposition Of Construction Trust; For Fraud And Undue Influence

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Guglielmino for Petitioner.
Jon Vaught appeared by telephone for Emilia Romero (Respondent).

Mr. Guglielmino stated that they are continuing to make progress in settlement negotiations, that they keep coming up with new issues, and that he thinks they can resolve this and if not, they can mediate. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than April 8, 2019. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by April 10, 2019. The Petition to Invalidate Trust Amendments for Lack of Capacity, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on April 15, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendments For Lack Of Capacity; Undue Influence; For Imposition Of Construction Trust; For Fraud And Undue Influence
Off Calendar Dec-17-2018 Continued To Feb-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brandon Meadows for Emilia Romero (Trustee).

Mr. Meadows stated that they are currently working on a settlement agreement, and that they are close, but they are not quite there yet. The Court noted that it was told the exact same thing at the last hearings. The Petition to Invalidate Trust Amendments for Lack of Capacity, etc. is continued to February 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court orders everyone to appear on that date. The Court informed Counsel that if the matter is not settled by then, it may have to set it for trial.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Off Calendar

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendments For Lack Of Capacity; Undue Influence; For Imposition Of Construction Trust; For Fraud And Undue Influence
Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Continued To Dec-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Guglielmino for Joseph Romero.
Jon Vaught for Emilia Romero (Respondent).

Mr. Guglielmino apologized to the Court for missing the last hearing stating that it was miscalendared. Mr. Gulgielmino also stated that they have made a great deal of progress on settlement negotiations and that they are close. Both Counsel also stated that mediation is not needed and that there will be no discovery. Mr. Guglielmino stated that the settlement calls for dismissal of the petition and that they will create another Trust. The Petition to Invalidate Trust Amendments for Lack of Capacity, etc. is continued to December 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendments For Lack Of Capacity; Undue Influence; For Imposition Of Construction Trust; For Fraud And Undue Influence
Off Calendar Aug-06-2018 Continued To Oct-01-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jon Vaught appeared by telephone for Emelia Romero (Respondent).

The Court noted that no one is present on behalf of the Petitioner. Mr. Vaught requested a continuance stating that he spoke with Mr. Guglielmino last week about settlement, that Mr. Guglielmino has been very ill for the last six to seven months and that at the last hearing Mr. Guglielmino asked for a continuance due to his illness. The Petition to Invalidate Trust Amendments for Lack of Capacity, etc. is continued to October 1, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court wants to make sure Mr. Guglielmino can continue on this matter and that the Parties are making progress. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Michael Guglielmino to appear on October 1, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to address the Court's concerns.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendments For Lack Of Capacity; Undue Influence; For Imposition Of Construction Trust; For Fraud And Undue Influence
Off Calendar Jun-11-2018 Continued To Aug-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendments For Lack Of Capacity; Undue Influence; For Imposition Of Construction Trust; For Fraud And Undue Influence
Off Calendar Dec-27-2017 Continued To Jun-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Guglielmino for petitioner Joseph Romero; Jon Vaught (by CourtCall) for respondent Emelia Romero.

Mr. Guglielmino reported that the parties has reached a settlement as of November 16, and that the remaining issues could be addressed by mediation. He added that he has been experiencing health issues requiring chemotherapy, and asked for a continuance of the hearing on the petition to April or May of 2018. In response to the Court's inquiry regarding the value of the trust assets, He gave his opinion that they totalled less than $3,000,000.00. Mr. Vaught agreed that the parties could proceed to pursue mediation, and agreed that the value of the trust assets was under $3,000,000.00.
The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than May 31, 2018. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by June 4, 2018. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on June 11, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Wan. (Not reported)

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendments For Lack Of Capacity; Undue Influence; For Imposition Of Construction Trust; For Fraud And Undue Influence
Off Calendar Sep-25-2017 Continued To Dec-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Guglielmino for Joseph Romero.
Jon Vaught for Emelia Romero (Respondent).

Mr. Guglielmino stated that he received the response ten days ago, but was unable to review it in detail due to being ill, that he needs to do discovery, that they need to review medical records, that the issue of whether the signature is genuine needs to be addressed and that they need at least 90-days. Mr. Vaught stated that he made a proposal, that he got no response, that Mr. Guglielmino's Client is residing at one of the properties, and that he needs to pay rent or the property will need to be sold. Mr. Guglielmino stated that there is an unlawful detainer that is in default, that he responded to the three day notice and that his Client is ready to pay the amount of rent that is being requested. The Petition to Invalidate Trust Amendments for Lack of Capacity, etc. is continued to December 27, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition To Invalidate Trust Amendments For Lack Of Capacity; Undue Influence; For Imposition Of Construction Trust; For Fraud And Undue Influence
Off Calendar Jul-24-2017 Continued To Sep-25-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Guglielmino for and with Joseph Romero (Petitioner).
Brandon Meadows appeared by telephone for Emilia Romero (Respondent/Settlor).

Mr. Meadows stated that he needs a week to get the objection filed. Mr. Guglielmino stated that he had a brief conversation with Mr. Vaught, that Mr. Vaught believes they can reach a settlement, and suggested a 60-day continuance so that they can work on settlement and determine whether they need to do discovery. The Petition to Invalidate Trust Amendments for Lack of Capacity, etc. is continued to September 25, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
